prompt: Modern museum gallery: illuminated glass display cases, mounted wall exhibits, engraved gallery signage, tall marble columns, and a bright ceiling skylight define a spacious exhibition hall. Eye-level central arrival, continuous ceiling and polished stone floor, coherent close-range architecture, even neutral daylight with focused exhibit spots, readable placards and materials. No haze, bloom, clipped whites, floating debris, text artifacts, or foreground obstruction. Photorealistic.
